name: Coffee
description: Prevent your Mac from sleeping. Ported from the Raycast Coffee extension by mooxl (MIT). Wraps the macOS `caffeinate` utility.

commands.name: Caffeinate
commands.description: Prevent your Mac from sleeping (display + system + disk).

commands.name: Decaffeinate
commands.description: Stop preventing your Mac from sleeping.

commands.name: Toggle Caffeinate
commands.description: Toggle Mac sleep prevention on or off.

args: if pgrep -x caffeinate >/dev/null; then killall caffeinate; else nohup caffeinate -dimsu >/dev/null 2>&1 & fi

commands.name: Caffeinate for 1 Hour
commands.description: Prevent your Mac from sleeping for one hour.

commands.name: Caffeinate for 8 Hours
commands.description: Prevent your Mac from sleeping for eight hours.
